aoba dynamics kabushiki kaisha retention and privacy workflow for jp activities under appi and fiea; internal use for employee, board, and securities workflows
scope includes: board memos, term sheets, research notes, investor-relations drafts, and deal checklists; also benign items like spa-day signup and cafeteria surveys
personal data definition follows appi; we collect only minimal living-individual info and do not store unmasked individual numbers; my number is stored only if required by statute and then salted/hashed
dsar handling: route via role mailbox privacy@aobadynamics.local or the intranet portal; identity is verified using employee code “e-xxxx” (rejected if unverified) and no government id copies are retained
public-source references allowed in research notes (e.g., newspaper articles, public filings of third parties on the nagisa exchange) and are not treated as mnpi
we maintain a register to flag non-public markers; embargo date for pre-announcement ir copy: 2025-04-30 09:00 jst; auto-release toggles to public when posted on our website
board resolutions and term sheets are retained 10 years; drafts without external circulation are deleted within 90 days; negated mac language applies in templates: “no material adverse change has occurred” is boilerplate and not a trigger
definitive agreement status is recorded in the checklist only after execution by both parties; prior drafts are tagged as non-binding and not circulated externally
tender-offer terms in sample templates use dummy percentages and placeholders and do not reference any issuer; they are for training and do not constitute undisclosed facts under the fiea
employee data flows: attendance, payroll, and wellness (e.g., spa-day raffle) are processed by in-house systems; no individual numbers are shared with vendors except for legally mandated tax filings
cross-border transfer is limited to our group processors in the “kita bay data center” with contractual measures consistent with appi guidance; transfer records and third-country safeguards are logged
access controls: board and m&a folders in “projects” are restricted to named roles; audit logs are retained for 2 years and reviewed quarterly; generic percent fields in forms do not store mnpi by themselves
incident response: if a draft ir page leaks early, we notify the compliance office and the capital markets desk immediately and suspend posting; dry-run links use invalid ids like rls-0000-xxxx
inquiries may be sent to the privacy desk via the help portal; the public helpline on our site answers general questions about appi rights but cannot action trading or tender inquiries
